name: academic-research-mcp
description: Search 9 academic databases — PubMed, arXiv, OpenAlex, Semantic Scholar, medRxiv/bioRxiv, CrossRef, Google Scholar, ORCID, Unpaywall — with 25 tools and systematic review support.
long_description: Unified MCP server for biomedical and CS literature search. Provides 25 tools across 9 APIs with local caching, PRISMA-compliant systematic review workflows, citation graph harvesting, and legal open-access PDF resolution. No API keys required for basic use.

openalex_email.title: Email (OpenAlex / CrossRef polite pool)
openalex_email.description: Registers you for the 10 req/sec polite pool on OpenAlex and faster CrossRef responses. Also required for Unpaywall PDF resolution.

s2_api_key.title: Semantic Scholar API key
s2_api_key.description: Optional. Raises rate limit from 100 req/5 min to 1 req/sec sustained. Get one free at semanticscholar.org.

ncbi_api_key.title: NCBI / PubMed API key
ncbi_api_key.description: Optional. Raises PubMed rate limit from 3 req/sec to 10 req/sec. Get one free at ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/account.

crossref_email.title: Email (CrossRef polite pool, optional override)
crossref_email.description: Optional. Use only if you want a different email for CrossRef than for OpenAlex. Defaults to the OpenAlex email if left blank.
